MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-16-2020 Vacated

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Invalid Appeal Of The Labor Commissioner_S Order, Decision Or Award Based On Late Filing
Off Calendar Sep-18-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT LEONEL BECERRA's Motion To Dismiss Invalid Appeal Of The Labor Commissioner'S Order, Decision Or Award Based On Late Filing.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is off calendar per moving party's notice of withdrawal filed September 3, 2020.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
